query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "weavebench: a long-horizon, real-world benchmark for computer-use agen" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly addresses the "long-horizon" and "computer-use agent" components of the user's question by providing a canonical benchmark (LPS-Bench) for evaluating safety and planning in the exact same domain (MCP-based CUAs), serving as essential prior work for any follow-up research on WeaveBench.
